expectations.text: checks coverage-report.json exists AND is < 24h old BEFORE any other action
expectations.evidence: Step 1 first sub-bullet: reads generated_at from JSON (explicitly not filesystem mtime) and checks < 24h.

expectations.text: checks git status --porcelain is empty and refuses on dirty tree
expectations.evidence: Step 1 second sub-bullet: runs git status --porcelain, refuses on non-empty.
Step 1 fourth sub-bullet: git checkout -b retrofit/annotate-procest-2026-04-24.

expectations.text: creates ghost change named retrofit-annotate-procest-{today} with empty specs/ and one task per REQ
expectations.evidence: Step 5: /opsx-new retrofit-annotate-procest-2026-04-24 with empty specs/ and one task per REQ.

expectations.text: uses AskUserQuestion before any file edits
expectations.evidence: Step 3: AskUserQuestion with Proceed/Review first/Cancel before any file edits.

expectations.text: uses Edit tool (or Write for full-file rewrite) — never sed/awk/python
expectations.evidence: Step 6: 'file-by-file using Edit tool only (never sed/awk/python)'.

expectations.text: runs composer phpcs and /hydra-gates after annotation

expectations.evidence: Step 9: appends SHA with header comment, then git add + separate commit.

expectations.text: archives the ghost change via /opsx-archive at the end
PR labels include both retrofit and annotation-only
expectations.evidence: Step 12: /create-pr with labels retrofit and annotation-only.
